# clickhouse_service (Data Source)

Look up a single ClickHouse Cloud service by its unique `id`. Returns the
service's metadata, scaling configuration, endpoints, access, and encryption
settings. Read-only; does not expose passwords.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "clickhouse_service" "example" {
  id = "aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee"
}

output "service_endpoints" {
  value = data.clickhouse_service.example.endpoints
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the service to look up.

### Read-Only

- `byoc_id` (String)
- `clickhouse_version` (String)
- `cloud_provider` (String)
- `compliance_type` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `enable_core_dumps` (Boolean)
- `encryption_assumed_role_identifier` (String)
- `encryption_key` (String)
- `encryption_role_id` (String)
- `endpoints` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--endpoints))
- `has_transparent_data_encryption` (Boolean)
- `iam_role` (String)
- `idle_scaling` (Boolean)
- `idle_timeout_minutes` (Number)
- `ip_access` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ip_access))
- `is_primary` (Boolean)
- `max_replica_memory_gb` (Number)
- `max_total_memory_gb` (Number)
- `min_replica_memory_gb` (Number)
- `min_total_memory_gb` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `num_replicas` (Number)
- `private_endpoint_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--private_endpoint_config))
- `private_endpoint_ids` (List of String)
- `readonly` (Boolean)
- `region` (String)
- `release_channel` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `tier` (String)
- `transparent_data_encryption_key_id` (String)
- `warehouse_id` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--endpoints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `endpoints`

Read-Only:

- `host` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `protocol` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--ip_access"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ip_access`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `source` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--private_endpoint_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `private_endpoint_config`

Read-Only:

- `endpoint_service_id` (String)
- `private_dns_hostname` (String)
